title: Add classical doc-copy 16.3M lzma submission
author: Muhtasham

data.description: Document-local copy expert over a discounted hashed 4-gram backoff chain, with active scoring path effectively using doc_copy_ctx2 only.
Packed 10-bit follower token storage to reduce artifact size.

novel_contributions: Document-local copy expert over a discounted hashed 4-gram backoff chain
lzma state compression to fit under the 16MB cap
Artifact-only evaluation on the official fineweb_val_* split
No training-shard access during final evaluation
